variants: Zoraida Peral is a distinguished expert in Chemical Physics, known for her significant contributions to the field. She is also an active member of the Periwinkle Planters Group, where she collaborates with fellow enthusiasts on various projects. Zoraida credits much of her success to her mentor, Diego Marrucci, who guided her during her doctoral studies.
